name: CourtListener API — Authenticated Access
description: User has authenticated CourtListener API access for live case law research
type: reference
originSessionId: afdcf3bd-76cb-4e2b-9010-ca4e99d5433c
---

- **Base URL:** https://www.courtlistener.com/api/rest/v4/
- **Auth:** `Authorization: Token {user_token}` — ask user for token each session (never stored)
- **Rate limit:** 10 req/min — add `sleep 3-5` between calls in loops
GET /search/?q={query}&type=o&order_by=score+desc&format=json
GET /opinions/?cluster={cluster_id}&format=json
summary: Full opinion text (by cluster_id from search results)

content:
GET /clusters/{id}/
```

```bash
TOKEN="user_provided_token"
curl -s -H "Authorization: Token $TOKEN" \
  "https://www.courtlistener.com/api/rest/v4/search/?q=Matter+H-A-A-V&type=o&format=json" \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(r['caseName'], r['dateFiled']) for r in d['results'][:5]]"
```
Millions of federal and state court opinions including BIA decisions (use `court_id=bia` filter or search "Board of Immigration Appeals").

name: User Profile — Law Office Santiago
description: User is COO and a non-litigating attorney at Law Office Santiago, building practice guides and teaching materials
type: user
originSessionId: afdcf3bd-76cb-4e2b-9010-ca4e99d5433c
---

COO **and** attorney at **Law Office Santiago** (ops@lawofficesantiago.com), an immigration firm in Katy, TX. Does **not** litigate — work is operations, advisory, and non-litigation legal work; route courtroom/litigation strategy to attorney review.
Building a library of master practice guides (.docx) for teaching and learning immigration law — covering BIA precedent cases, habeas corpus, and litigation strategies.

- Prefers comprehensive .docx files with color-coded sections, tables, checklists, and callout boxes
- Uses WPS Office on Mac
- Wants real case law pulled from CourtListener API (has authenticated access — ask for token)
- Works in English and Spanish
- Wants guides usable for both attorneys and clients

- macOS, /Users/francisco/ home directory
- WPS Office installed at /Applications/wpsoffice.app
- Python 3 with python-docx available
- CourtListener API authenticated (token provided per session)

- Case guides: `/Users/francisco/docs/`
- Habeas corpus library: `/Users/francisco/docs/Habeas_Corpus_Master/`

- [Firm habeas pro se model](firm-habeas-pro-se-model.md) — Firm drafts full habeas + motions but files pro se in client's name; attorney name does NOT appear on the filing.
- [Paralegal: Roberth Suarez](firm-paralegal-roberth-suarez.md) — Drafts federal habeas under the pro se ghostwriting model; address training docs to him by name.
- [User email](user-email.md) — User's working email is ayuda@lawofficesantiago.com (replaces ops@).
